calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-30-2010 Off Calendar

Hearing On The Petition To Approve The Compromise Of A Disputed Claim Of A Minor.
Off Calendar Feb-23-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
Ragunath K. Kindial, Esq. for Petitioner: Rosario Sievers, present as Guardian ad litem for: Nicolas Ruiz, a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Attorney's Fees $8,333.00
A net balance of $25,000.35 to be deposited into a blocked account with Golden One Credit Union, 111 Grant Ave., Oakland, CA. 94612, no withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Order Approving Compromise of Claim and Order to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account signed in open court.

Hearing On The Petition To Approve The Compromise Of A Disputed Claim Of A Minor.
